scripts.dev:fleet: concurrently -n alpha,beta,gamma -c blue,green,magenta "RUNTIME_ID=alpha pnpm -F @sonar/runtime dev" "RUNTIME_ID=beta pnpm -F @sonar/runtime dev" "RUNTIME_ID=gamma pnpm -F @sonar/runtime dev"
scripts.dev:fleet+ui: concurrently -k -n operator,alpha,beta,gamma,demo-ui -c yellow,blue,green,magenta,cyan "pnpm -F @sonar/operator dev" "RUNTIME_ID=alpha pnpm -F @sonar/runtime dev" "RUNTIME_ID=beta pnpm -F @sonar/runtime dev" "RUNTIME_ID=gamma pnpm -F @sonar/runtime dev" "pnpm -F @sonar/demo-ui dev"
scripts.dev:axl: concurrently -k -n axl-a,axl-b,fleet+ui,bridge -c blue,green,yellow,magenta "./infra/axl/start-a.sh" "./infra/axl/start-b.sh" "pnpm dev:fleet+ui" "sleep 4 && pnpm dev:axl-bridge"
scripts.//deploy:contracts:dry: gitleaks:allow nextline -- this is the well-known Anvil test key, not a real secret
scripts.deploy:contracts: cd contracts && forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --sig 'run()' --rpc-url base_sepolia --broadcast --slow && pnpm exec tsx script/RecordDeployment.ts
